title: Create: Compatible Storage
description: Having issues with Quark's chests on Create contraptions? This mod fixes them and much more.
body:
## Create: Compatible Storage

> **Requires Create 6.0.X**

Modded chests variants on contraptions are **not** treated as an inventory and therefore can't pick up items from contraption actors, be opened by hand or accessed by portable storage interfaces.

This mod aims to fix this issue by adding the proper block tags, so you can use prettier chests.

Supported mods:
- Quark (chest variants)
- Woodworks (chest variants, bamboo closet, cross-compat wood included)
- More Chest Variants (chest variants)
- Farmer's Delight (cabinets, basket)
- My Nether's Delight (cabinet variants)
- Storage Delight (everything)
- Stone Chest (chest variants)
- MrCrayfish's Furniture: Refurbished (everything except fridges, mailboxes partially supported)
- Handcrafted (everything with storage)
- Another Furniture (drawers)
- Ars Nouveau (repositories, archwood chest)
- Iron Chests (chest tiers, partial crystal chest support)
- Iron Shulker Boxes (shulker box tiers, partial crystal shulker box support)
- Goety (chest variants, partial raiding chest support)
- Carved Wood (chest and barrel variants)
- Hexerei (chest variants)
- The Twilight Forest (chest variants)
- Alex's Caves (gingerbarrels, metal/rusty barrels)

Extra features:
- Every Compat support for all supported mods
- GUI titles of mounted storages are more consistent ("Moving Shulker Box" instead of "Moving Red Shulker Box")
- Opening and closing sounds are more consistent (barrels have a close sound, shulker boxes have their sounds)
- Campfire variants from Carved Wood emit smoke on contraptions
- Gingerbread doors from Alex's Caves can be opened on contraptions

[![Available on CurseForge](https://badges.penpow.dev/badges/available/curseforge/cozy.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-compatible-storage)
